data.content: Plan review: scope is minimal and correct. Capsule fields agentname/model/version are stamped by Knots per contract rule 4 (Knots stamps every artifact) and may be read directly per rule 5. The AgentInfo shape has matching {agentName, model, version} keys, so the rewrite is a pure rename — no formatting needed. Deleting to-active-agent-info.ts is preferred per knot acceptance criterion (a). The page.tsx re-export must come down with it. Approving plan.
